verdict.summary: Round 3 finds no correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security defect in the design-only change. The proposed constraint derives the blank-node branch from a domain-constrained per-position type code and recomputes each active encoding, while inactive slots remain gated consistently with the existing fold. The public salt is specified as reconstructed from the issuer-attested value rather than prover-controlled bytes. The verification obligations cover the real circuit path, both subject/object blank nodes, wrong-salt and selector-forcing negative cases, regenerated VK/gate fixtures, and real-bb end-to-end verification. Claims remain explicitly design-only and deferred; the document does not claim implementation or external audit completion.
